summary: A Go-based testing and validation framework with MCP integration, currently focused on improving test stability through flakiness detection.
concerns: high volume of agent-generated extra tests suggests potential flakiness or unstable core logic
scattered test directories across GOrchestra/glm-agents/ indicate complex automated test generation pipeline
recent commits mention flakiness detector (FEAT-044), confirming test stability issues
suggestions: prioritize stabilizing core runner and schema logic to reduce need for extra tests
consolidate or clean up the numerous agent-generated test directories
focus on the flakiness detector implementation to improve CI reliability
